docTitle: Baibolo pa Mapu · Baibolo mu Skrolo Limoza
metaDesc: Rondezgani ndondomeko ya Testamente Lakale, umoyo wa Yesu, na maulendo gha Paulo pa mapu ghanadi — Baibolo likachitika mu malo ghanadi.

s.title: Baibolo pa Mapu
s.verse: “Pakuti ise kuti tikarondezga vidokoni vyakwata waka chara para tikamumanyiskani vya nkhongono na vya kwiza kwa Fumu yithu Yesu Khristu, kweni tikaŵa ŵakaboni ŵa uchindami wakhe.” (2 Petrosi 1:16)
s.purpose: Baibolo kuti ni nthanu chara. Ni kalembo ka ŵanthu awo ŵakenda mu malo, madazi, na mazina ghanadi. Rondezgani nthowa izi pa mapu, mwakulondezgana na nyengo — pininani malo, panji dinyani ▶ kuti mwende sitepe pa sitepe.
s.ot_h: Kufuma ku chilengiwa kufika ku kuwelera ku Yerusalemu
s.ot_lead: Kuti ni ulendo umoza pera chara kweni ni kwenda kwa mbiri ya chiponosko kwamba ku chilengiwa: chilengiwa na kuwa → chigumula na Babeli → chemo (Abrahamu) → charu cha layizgo → Kufumamo → mapopa → kutora charu → ufumu → kugaŵikana → wuzga → kuwelera.
s.je_kick: ② Testamente Liphya — umoyo wa Yesu
s.je_h: Kufuma ku Betelehemu kufika ku Yerusalemu
s.je_lead: Rondezgani umoyo wa Yesu umo Mauthenga Ghaweme ghakuyowoyera, mu ndondomeko — kufuma ku kubabika kwake mu Betelehemu, kwizira mu ubatizo wake na uteŵeti mu Galileya, kwambuka Samariya, kufika ku mphinjika, kuwuka, na kukwera kuchanya mu Yerusalemu.
s.pa_kick: ③ Testamente Liphya — maulendo gha Paulo
s.pa_h: Kufuma ku Antiyoke kufika ku mphererekezgo za charu — Roma
s.pa_lead: Kwamba ku Pentekoste mu Yerusalemu, umo uthenga uweme ukwandanira kujumpha Yudeya — kwizira mu Asiya Yichoko na Yuropa kufika ku mtima wa Ufumu wa Roma. Sankhani ulendo umoza pa maulendo ghankhondi (wakwamba·wachiŵiri·wachitatu + ulendo wa ku Roma + pamanyuma pa kufwatulika) ndipo rondezgani vyakuchitika vya mu Milimo pamoza na makalata agho ghakalembeka mu nthowa.
s.foot: Vyakufumako · Malo ghakulondezga malemba gha Baibolo na jografiya yakuzomerezgeka ya Baibolo (na mazina gha mazuŵa ghano apo ghakovwira). Mphepete za nyanja, mironga, na manyanja vikapangika kufuma ku data ya jografiya yakujulika (Natural Earth), yakupepusika.

eden.name: Edeni (Chilengiwa · Kuwa)
eden.note: Mu charu icho chikaŵa chiweme chomene, kwananga kukanjira ndipo kukaswa ukomano pakati pa Chiuta na ŵanthu.
events: Chilengiwa mu mazuŵa ghankhondi na limoza — “vikaŵa viweme chomene”
Ŵanthu ŵakalengeka mu chikozgo cha Chiuta
Kuwa, na kuchimbizgika ku Edeni
Layizgo lakwamba la uthenga uweme — “mphapu ya mwanakazi yamkuphwanya mutu wa njoka”

noah.name: Ararati (Chigumula)
noah.today: Phiri la Ararati, kumafumiro gha dazi kwa Turkiye mazuŵa ghano
noah.note: Chiuta wakweruzga charu chakuzura na kwananga, kweni wakusunga umoyo kwizira mu mbumba yimoza.
events: Charu chakuzura na uheni
Chigumula, na ngalaŵa ya Nowa
Phangano la uta — “chigumula chizamkuparanyaso charu chara”

babel.name: Nsanja ya Babeli
babel.note: Pa kujikuzga uko kukukhumba kufika kuchanya, Chiuta wakumbwandukiska chiyowoyero chawo na ŵanthu pa charu chose.
events: “Tizengani msumba na nsanja… ndipo tijipangire zina”
Chiuta wakutimbanizga chiyowoyero chawo
Ŵanthu ŵakumbwalalika pa charu chose (Shinari — panyuma Babuloni)

ur.name: Uru
ur.note: Nkhani ya chiponosko mu Baibolo yikwamba na chemo la munthu yumoza.
events: Chiuta wakuchema Abramu kufuma ku Uru wa ŵaKalidi
“Ndamkukuzgora iwe fuko likuru… mafuko ghose ghamkutumbikika mwa iwe”
Na chipulikano wakufumamo mu charu chake

haran.name: Harani
haran.note: Mu nthowa, kuzgora chemo lakuya ku charu cha layizgo.
events: Mbumba ya Tera yikukhala mu Harani
Tera wakufwa
Abramu wakwamba ulendo wakuya ku Kenani mu vyaka 75

shechem.name: Shekemu · Kenani
shechem.note: Mu charu cha layizgo mbumba yikwimikika ndipo phangano likulutilira ku miwiro na miwiro.
events: Kunjira mu Kenani, jotchero lakwamba — “ku mphapu yako ndipeleka charu ichi”
Phangano (Mutendeko 15) · Isaki · Yakhobe
Ŵana ŵa Yakhobe khumi na ŵaŵiri — muzu wa mafuko khumi na ghaŵiri

egypt.name: Eguputo (Gosheni)
egypt.today: Delta ya Naile, Eguputo mazuŵa ghano
egypt.note: Mbumba yikuzgoka fuko likuru — kufika fuko la ŵazga.
events: Yosefe, wakuguliskika, wakukwera kuwusa Eguputo
Mbumba yose ya Yakhobe yikukhilira kuchimbira njara
Fuko la Israele ilo likukura likuzgoka uzga

sinai.name: Phiri la Sinai
sinai.note: Chiponosko chikuru cha Testamente Lakale — ŵazga ŵakuzgoka ŵanthu ŵa Chiuta.
events: Vilengo khumi na mwanawemberere wa Pasaka
Nyanja Yiswesi yikugaŵikana ndipo ŵakwambuka
Marango Ghakhumi, Dango, chihema na sembe

kadesh.name: Kadeshi (mapopa)
kadesh.note: Kuleka kupulikana kukupokera muwiro umoza charu — kweni Chiuta wakukhalilira nawo.
events: Ŵakalaŵiliri khumi na ŵaŵiri — kweni ŵanthu ŵakukana kugomezga
Vyaka 38 mu mapopa — mana, bingu na moto
Pa vigwa vya Moabu, upharazgi waumaliro wa Mozesi (Duteronome)

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Paumaliro ŵakunjira na kutora charu cha layizgo.
events: Yorodani ukugaŵikana ndipo ŵanthu ŵakwambuka
Mipanda ya Yeriko yikuwa
Kutora Kenani na kugaŵana charu

shiloh.name: Shilo (Ŵeruzgi)
shiloh.note: Kwambura karonga, waliyose wakuchita umo wakukhumbira — karonga wanadi wakukhumbikwa.
events: Chihema chikimikika ku Shilo
Mzunguluko wa kwananga–kuyuzgika–kuponoska (Debora, Gidiyoni, Samusoni)
Rutu — kugomezgeka mu mazuŵa gha mdima, mu mphapu ya Davide

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu · Ufumu Wakukolerana
jerusalem.note: Nyengo yiweme chomene ya Israele — na layizgo la karonga wambura kumara.
events: Sauli karonga wakwamba, kufika Davide na Goliyati
Phangano la Davide — “chizumbe chako muyirayira” (2 Samuele 7)
Solomoni wakuzenga tempile mu Yerusalemu

samaria.name: Samariya · Ufumu Wakugaŵikana
samaria.note: Ufumu ukugaŵikana na kunanga apo nchimi zikulira.
events: Pamanyuma pa Solomoni, kugaŵikana mu Yuda na Israele
Kusopa vikozgo kwakuwerezgeka
Eliya, Yesaya, Yeremiya ŵakulira ‘welani’ — na kuyowoyera Mesiya

nineveh.name: Nineve (Asiriya)
nineveh.note: Mwakusuzga cenjezgo lililose, kumpoto kukuwa kudankha.
events: Nineve, likuru la Asiriya
Ufumu wa kumpoto ukuwira ku Asiriya (722 BC)
Yona wakutumika ku Nineve

babylon.name: Babuloni
babylon.note: Usiku wamdima chomene — kweni layizgo la kuwezgeka likukhalilira.
events: Yerusalemu ukuwa, tempile likotcheka (586 BC)
Yuda wakutolekera ku Babuloni
Danyeli na Ezekiyeli — chipulikano na mawoneskero mu wuzga

susa.name: Susa (Peresiya)
susa.note: Nanga ni pa mtima wa ufumu wa ŵamitundu, Chiuta wakusunga ŵanthu ŵake.
events: Peresiya ikuwiska Babuloni
Esitere wakuponoska ŵaYuda ku kunangika
Nehemiya wakulomba panthazi pa karonga ndipo wakatumika

return.name: Kuwelera ku Yerusalemu
return.note: Ŵakuwelera na kuzengaso — kweni kulije karonga uyo wiza. Ŵakulindilira Mesiya.
events: Mawundo ghatatu gha kuwelera na chiphalizgo cha Koresi (Zerubabeli 538 · Ezira 458 · Nehemiya 444)
Tempile likazengekaso na mipanda ya Yerusalemu yikawezgekaso
Malaki — Testamente Lakale likumara: “Nditi nditume thenga lane”

bethlehem.name: Betelehemu
bethlehem.note: Mesiya wakulayizgika wakwiza ku msumba wa Davide — Mazgu ghakuzgoka munthu.
events: Wakababika mu Betelehemu, msumba wa Davide
Ŵangelo ŵakupharazgira ŵaliska nkhani
Ŵanjeru ŵa kumafumiro gha dazi ŵakwiza kusopa

nazareth.name: Nazarete
nazareth.note: Chiuta wakukura nga munthu mu msumba wanyawaka.
events: Wakalereka mu nyumba ya mukalipentara
Pa vyaka khumi na viŵiri, kufumba na kuzgora mu tempile
Panyuma wakukanika mu sunagoge ya kukwawo

jordan.name: Mronga wa Yorodani
jordan.note: Uteŵeti wake wapakweru ukwamba — kuchanya kukumusindikizga kuŵa Mwana.
events: Wakubatizika na Yohane
Mzimu ukukhilira nga nkhunda — “Uyu ni Mwana wane wakutemweka”
Wakutonda mayezgo ghatatu gha Satana mu mapopa

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Mu chimanyikwiro chake chakwamba wakuvumbura uchindami wake.
events: Mulendo pa nthengwa
Maji ghakuzgoka vinyo — chimanyikwiro chake chakwamba
Ŵasambiri ŵake ŵakumugomezga

sychar.name: Sukare (Samariya)
sychar.note: Nthowa ya uteŵeti wakwamba — kwizira mu Yerusalemu kufika ku Samariya yakuyuyulika.
events: Wakutozga tempile mu Yerusalemu
Usiku, Nikodemo — “Ukwenera kubabika kaŵiri”
Maji gha umoyo kwa mwanakazi Musamariya

capernaum.name: Kaperenaumu
capernaum.today: mumphepete mwa nyanja ya Galileya mazuŵa ghano
capernaum.note: Malo ghakukhala gha uteŵeti wa mu Galileya — kuchema, kusambizga, na kususkika vyose vikukumana apa.
events: Wakuchema ŵalovi na kukhazikika apa
Upharazgi wa pa Phiri — “Mbakutumbikika ŵakavu mu mzimu”
Ntharika za ufumu — na kususkika kukukura

galilee.name: Nyanja ya Galileya
galilee.note: Na nkhongono pa vyalengiwa wakulongora kuti ni njani.
events: “Khala chete, tondeka” — wakukhazika chimphepo
Wakulyeska ŵanthu 5,000 na vingwa vinkhondi na somba ziŵiri
Wakwenda pa maji

caesarea_p.name: Kesareya-Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Ŵasambiri ŵakupulikiska kuti iyo ni Khristu, ndipo nthowa ya mphinjika yikujuka.
events: Kuzomera kwa Petrosi — “Imwe ndimwe Khristu, Mwana wa Chiuta wamoyo”
Wakwamba kuyowoyerathu nyifwa na kuwuka kwake
Wakusandulika mu uchindami pa phiri

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Pa nthowa yakukwelera ku Yerusalemu, wakupenja ŵakuzgeŵa.
events: Wakupa masono kwa Baritimeyo wachibulumutira
Wakuchema Zakeyo mtoleska msonkho
“Mwana wa Munthu wakiza kupenja na kuponoska ŵakuzgeŵa”

bethany.name: Betaniya
bethany.note: Wakulongora nkhongono pa nyifwa pa mphepete pa sabata yake yaumaliro.
events: Wakuwuska Lazaro ku dindi — “Ine ndine kuwuka na umoyo”
Mariya wakumuphaka mafuta kunozgekera kusungika kwake
Chimanyikwiro ichi chikukhozga mphangano ya kumukoma

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu
jerusalem.note: Chigema icho Baibolo lose likulongora — mphinjika, kuwuka, kukwera kuchanya.
events: Kunjira mwauchindami; wakubindulika matebulo gha mu tempile kaŵiri
Pa Mugongo Wakumaliro wakugeza malundi gha ŵasambiri
Wakufwa pa mphinjika
Wakuwuka pa zuŵa la chitatu, ndipo wakukwera kuchanya

antioch.name: Antiyoke
antioch.note: Mpingo wakutuma uko uteŵeti ku ŵamitundu ukwamba na kuwelera.
events: Mu lurombo Mzimu ukupatula Baranaba na Sauli
Mpingo uko ŵakugomezga ŵakachemeka dankha ‘Ŵakhristu’
Malo ghakwambira maulendo ghakwamba, ghachiŵiri na ghachitatu

seleucia.name: Selukiya
seleucia.note: Dowoko la Antiyoke — ŵakukwera ngalaŵa kuya ku Kipuro.

salamis.name: Salami (Kipuro)
salamis.note: Malo ghakwamba pa Kipuro — kupharazga mu masunagoge.

paphos.name: Pafosi
paphos.note: Nkhongono yikulongoreka pa awo ŵakususka uthenga uweme.
events: Elima musenga wakutimbika kuŵa wachibulumutira
Serigiyo Paulo kazembe wakugomezga
Kufuma apa ‘Paulo’ wakulongozga

perga.name: Perega
perga.note: Dowoko la mu Pamfiliya — apa Yohane Mariko wakuwelako.

pantioch.name: Antiyoke wa Pisidiya
events: Upharazgi utali wa mbiri ya chiponosko mu sunagoge
Ŵamitundu ŵanandi ŵakukondwa na kupokera mazgu
Ŵakuchimbizgika na ŵakususka

lystra.name: Lisitira
lystra.note: Ŵakumuchindika nga chiuta, kufika kumudinya na malibwe.
events: Wakuchizga munthu wakupendera kufuma ku kubabika
Wumba ukuyezga kuŵapeleka sembe nga ni ŵachiuta
Ŵakumudinya na malibwe na kumuleka nga wafwa, kweni wakuwuka

derbe.name: Derebe
derbe.note: Ŵasambiri ŵanandi ŵakupangika; ŵakuwelera kukhozga mipingo.

troas.name: Turowa
troas.note: Malo ghakusinthira apo uthenga uweme ukwamba kunanga ku Yuropa.
events: Mawoneskero gha munthu wa ku Makedoniya
“Zani ku Makedoniya, mutovwire”
Ŵakwambuka nyengo yeneyiyo kuya ku Yuropa

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.note: Mpingo wakwamba wa ku Yuropa — uthenga uweme ukutonda nanga ni mu jele.
events: Lidiya, wakuguliska salu zaswesi, wakugomezga
Msungwana muzga wakuwukwa wakufwatulika
Sumu za pakati pa usiku, chindindindi, mbumba ya mulinda wa jele yikuponoskeka

thess.name: Tesalonika
thess.note: Mazgu ghakusunkhunya msumba ndipo kususkika kukukwera.
events: Wakususkana mu sunagoge maSabata ghatatu
“Aŵa ŵakupindula charu chose”
Ŵakufumako usiku

berea.name: Bereya
events: Ŵakupokera mazgu na mtima wose
Zuŵa lililose ŵakusanda Malembo kuti ŵawone usange nadi
Ŵanandi ŵakugomezga

athens.name: Ateni
athens.note: Mu msumba wa ŵanjeru wakupharazga ‘chiuta wambura kumanyikwa’.
events: Wakukwiyiskika na msumba wakuzura na vikozgo
Pa Areyopaga wakupharazga Mulengi na kuwuka
Ŵakumuseka, kweni ŵachoko ŵakugomezga

corinth.name: Korinte
corinth.note: Wakukhala chaka na hafu, wakupanda mpingo mu msumba wa uheni.
events: Wakupanga mahema na Akwila na Prisila
“Ungawopanga chara… pakuti ndili nawe”
ŴaKorinte ŵanandi ŵakugomezga na kubatizika

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Mtima wa ulendo wachitatu — mazgu ghakwandana mu Asiya.
events: Kusambizga zuŵa lililose kwa vyaka viŵiri mu nyumba ya Turano
Mabuku gha usenga ghakotcheka; milimo yankhongono
Demetiri musuli wa siliva wakwambiska chiwawa

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Kulayilana kwa masozi na ŵalara ŵa ku Efeso.
events: “Liskani mpingo uwo wakagura na ndopa zake”
Ŵalara ŵakulira, ŵakumanya kuti ŵamuwonaso chara

caesarea.name: Kesareya
caesarea.today: mumphepete mwa nyanja ya Israeli mazuŵa ghano
caesarea.note: Kwa vyaka viŵiri wakuvikilira uthenga uweme panthazi pa ŵakazembe na karonga.
events: Milandu panthazi pa ŵakazembe Felikisi na Festo
Kujivikilira kwake panthazi pa Karonga Agiripa
“Nkhuŵeya kwa Kesare” — kuya ku Roma

jerusalem.name: Yerusalemu
jerusalem.note: Wakukorika mu tempile, nthowa yake nga mukaidi yikwamba.
events: Wakukorika na wumba mu tempile
Wakujivikilira panthazi pa khoti
Nga mwenekaya wa Roma, wakutumika mwakulindika ku Kesareya

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Ŵakukwelera mu ngalaŵa ya ku Alekizandiriya yakuya ku Roma.

fairhaven.name: Madowoko Ghaweme (Kerete)
fairhaven.note: Cenjezgo la Paulo la kuleka kwenda pa nyanja likupulikika chara.

crete.name: Kerete
crete.note: Pamanyuma pa kufwatulika kwake, chilumba icho wakusida Tito kunozga mipingo.
events: Wakusida Tito kwimika ŵalara mu msumba uliwose
Wakukhumba ŵalongozgi ŵambura kanyoŵo, ŵakugomezgeka
Wakulemba kalata kwa Tito

malta.name: Melita
malta.note: Kwizira mu chimphepo na kuswekeka kwa ngalaŵa, layizgo la Chiuta likukhalilira.
events: Chimphepo cha ‘kumpoto-kumafumiro’ chikuswenya ngalaŵa, kweni wose 276 ŵakupona
Wakulumika na njoka, kweni wakupwetekeka chara
Wakuchizga ŵalwari ŵa pa chilumba

puteoli.name: Puteyoli
puteoli.note: Ŵakufika ku Italiya ndipo ŵakukumana na ŵabali ŵakugomezga.

rome.name: Roma
rome.book: Milimo 28 · Makalata gha mu Jele · 2 Timote
rome.note: Uthenga uweme ukufika ku mtima wa ufumu paumaliro — kuti ni umaliro chara kweni ni mutendeko.
events: Vyaka viŵiri mu ukaidi wa panyumba, wakupharazga ufumu mwachikanga
Kufuma apa wakulemba Makalata gha mu Jele (Ŵaefeso·ŴaFilipi·Ŵakolose·Filemoni)
Panyuma wakukakika kaŵiri, wakulemba 2 Timote ndipo wakukomeka chifukwa cha chipulikano — “Nkhalwa nkhondo yiweme, nkhamaliska lweru”
